docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Skeleton

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Skeleton do
  use Phoenix.Component

  attr :class, :string, default: nil
  attr :rest, :global

  def skeleton(assigns) do
    ~H"""
    <div
      class={["animate-pulse rounded-md bg-primary/10", @class]}
      {@rest}
    />
    """
  end
end

name: skeleton
title: Skeleton
